name: Pistachio Bundt Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package White or yellow cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large bowl and mix at low speed for 1 minute.
2. Mix at higher speed for about 3 minutes, or until well blended.
3. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased and floured 12-cup, 10-inch Bundt pan.
4. To the remaining 1/3 of the batter, add chocolate syrup. Stir until well mixed.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture over the batter in the pan.
6. Use a knife to marble the batter.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before turning out.
